docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY GIBBS CHARLES JR AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSON PERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSON PERRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIBBS CHARLES JR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSSON PERRY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, $100.00 TO BE PAID ON 1/15/92. AND $650.00 TO BE PAID ON 2/20/92. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
